ucs.title: [LLM] Indrik Spider / Evil Corp SocGholish (FakeUpdates) — wscript.exe → PowerShell chain from browser-dropped ZIP
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Indrik Spider initial-access chain: a compromised legitimate website serves a 'browser update' ZIP (SocGholish/FakeUpdates) that contains a .js file. When the user runs it, wscript.exe executes the JS from Downloads/Temp and spawns PowerShell to pull a NetSupport RAT or Cobalt Strike beacon — Mandiant tracks this cluster as UNC1543/UNC2165 and Microsoft as DEV-0206/DEV-0243 (Manatee Tempest), Evil Corp's preferred ingress since at least 2018.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as child_cmd values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="wscript.exe" (Processes.parent_process="*\\Downloads\\*" OR Processes.parent_process="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" OR Processes.parent_process="*\\Users\\Public\\*") (Processes.parent_process="*.js*" OR Processes.parent_process="*.jse*") (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" OR Processes.process_name="pwsh.exe" OR Processes.process_name="cmd.exe" OR Processes.process_name="mshta.exe") (Processes.process="*EncodedCommand*" OR Processes.process="*-enc *" OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*IEX*" OR Processes.process="*Invoke-Expression*" OR Processes.process="*-w hidden*" OR Processes.process="*windowstyle hidden*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Indrik Spider / SocGholish: browser-dropped JS executed by wscript spawns PowerShell to fetch payload
let LookbackDays = 7d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"                                 // skip machine accounts
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "wscript.exe"
// JS / JSE launched out of user-writable, internet-facing directories — SocGholish drops to Downloads or %TEMP%
| where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (".js", ".jse")
| where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (@"\Downloads\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Roaming\")
// Non-script-host child = breakout into staging / C2 retrieval
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "cmd.exe", "mshta.exe", "rundll32.exe")
// Either obfuscated payload OR network retrieval — both characteristic of the SocGholish loader stage
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("EncodedCommand", "-enc ", " -ec ", "FromBase64String",
                                    "DownloadString", "DownloadFile", "IEX", "Invoke-Expression",
                                    "WebClient", "Net.WebRequest")
   or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)-w(in)?(dow)?style?\s+h(idden)?"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          GrandparentImage = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          ParentImage      = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd        = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage       = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd         = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256      = SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Indrik Spider / SocGholish — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688 (requires command-line auditing GPO)
let LookbackDays = 7d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName endswith "wscript.exe"
// SecurityEvent 4688 carries the *child* CommandLine; parent cmdline is unavailable, so we anchor on the
// distinctive child behaviour (PS/cmd/mshta with encoded/IEX payload) — Evil Corp's loader signature.
| where NewProcessName endswith "powershell.exe"
     or NewProcessName endswith "pwsh.exe"
     or NewProcessName endswith "cmd.exe"
     or NewProcessName endswith "mshta.exe"
     or NewProcessName endswith "rundll32.exe"
| where CommandLine has_any ("EncodedCommand", "-enc ", " -ec ", "FromBase64String",
                              "DownloadString", "DownloadFile", "IEX", "Invoke-Expression",
                              "WebClient", "Net.WebRequest")
   or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)-w(in)?(dow)?style?\s+h(idden)?"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName,
          CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Indrik Spider SocGholish JS-to-PowerShell Loader Chain
id: 7c4d2a8e-3f1b-4a59-9c2e-1ab9c0e1d201
status: experimental
description: Detects the canonical Evil Corp / Indrik Spider SocGholish (FakeUpdates) initial-access chain where wscript.exe runs a .js dropped to Downloads/Temp and spawns PowerShell/cmd/mshta with an obfuscated or download-cradle payload.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0119/
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/socgholish-fake-update-cluster
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/  # Manatee Tempest / DEV-0243
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/07
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1189
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.007
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.g0119
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\wscript.exe'
    ParentCommandLine|contains:
      - '.js'
      - '.jse'
  selection_parent_path:
    ParentCommandLine|contains:
      - '\Downloads\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
      - '\Users\Public\'
      - '\AppData\Roaming\'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
  selection_child_behaviour:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'EncodedCommand'
      - '-enc '
      - ' -ec '
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'DownloadFile'
      - 'IEX'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - 'WebClient'
      - '-w hidden'
      - 'windowstyle hidden'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_parent_path and selection_child and selection_child_behaviour
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate JS-based admin tooling launched from user profile (rare; should be allow-listed by hash)
level: high
ucs.rationale: SocGholish (FakeUpdates) has been the definitive initial-access loader for Indrik Spider/Evil Corp since 2018, named explicitly in CrowdStrike, Mandiant (UNC1543/UNC2165), and Microsoft (Manatee Tempest / DEV-0206 / DEV-0243) reporting. The chain is unique because (a) wscript.exe rarely spawns powershell.exe in benign environments, (b) the parent JS lives in user-writable internet-facing directori

ucs.title: [LLM] Indrik Spider WastedLocker / Hades pre-encryption sequence — takeown + icacls + vssadmin within 30 minutes
ucs.description: Hunts Evil Corp's signature host preparation immediately before encryption: WastedLocker / Hades / Macaw / PhoenixCryptoLocker characteristically run takeown.exe /R against shares to seize ownership, follow with icacls.exe /grant Everyone:F to remove ACL friction, then vssadmin/wmic delete shadows to inhibit recovery — all within minutes, often elevated by the CMSTPLUA UAC bypass. This is the impact-stage fingerprint Microsoft (Manatee Tempest) and Symantec WastedLocker writeups call out.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as procs from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name="takeown.exe" AND Processes.process="*/R*") OR (Processes.process_name="icacls.exe" AND (Processes.process="*/grant*" OR Processes.process="*everyone*" OR Processes.process="*Everyone*")) OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process _time span=1s | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval bucket=floor(_time/1800) | eventstats dc(process_name) as proc_variety values(process_name) as proc_set by dest bucket | where proc_variety>=3 AND mvfind(proc_set,"takeown.exe")>=0 AND (mvfind(proc_set,"vssadmin.exe")>=0 OR mvfind(proc_set,"wmic.exe")>=0 OR mvfind(proc_set,"bcdedit.exe")>=0) | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Indrik Spider WastedLocker/Hades pre-encryption fingerprint:
// takeown /R + icacls /grant + vssadmin/wmic delete shadows on the same host within 30 min
let LookbackHours = 4h;
let WindowMin = 30m;
let TakeOwn = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName =~ "takeown.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "/R" or ProcessCommandLine has "/r"           // recursive — Evil Corp signature
    | summarize TakeownTime = min(Timestamp), TakeownCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine) by DeviceId, DeviceName;
let Icacls = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where FileName =~ "icacls.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/grant", "/T", "everyone:F", "Everyone:(F)", "/inheritance")
    | summarize IcaclsTime = min(Timestamp), IcaclsCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine) by DeviceId;
let ShadowDelete = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows")
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy", "delete"))
         or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no", "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
    | summarize ShadowTime = min(Timestamp), ShadowCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine) by DeviceId;
TakeOwn
| join kind=inner Icacls on DeviceId
| join kind=inner ShadowDelete on DeviceId
| extend DeltaMin = max_of(
        abs(datetime_diff('minute', TakeownTime, IcaclsTime)),
        abs(datetime_diff('minute', TakeownTime, ShadowTime)),
        abs(datetime_diff('minute', IcaclsTime,  ShadowTime)))
| where DeltaMin <= toint(WindowMin / 1m)
| project DeviceName, TakeownTime, IcaclsTime, ShadowTime, DeltaMin,
          TakeownCmd, IcaclsCmd, ShadowCmd
| order by TakeownTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Indrik Spider WastedLocker pre-encryption fingerprint — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688
let LookbackHours = 4h;
let WindowMin = 30m;
let Base = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$";
let TakeOwn = Base
    | where NewProcessName endswith "takeown.exe"
    | where CommandLine has "/R" or CommandLine has "/r"
    | summarize TakeownTime = min(TimeGenerated), TakeownCmd = any(CommandLine) by Computer;
let Icacls = Base
    | where NewProcessName endswith "icacls.exe"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("/grant", "/T", "everyone:F", "Everyone:(F)", "/inheritance")
    | summarize IcaclsTime = min(TimeGenerated), IcaclsCmd = any(CommandLine) by Computer;
let ShadowDelete = Base
    | where (NewProcessName endswith "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadows")
         or (NewProcessName endswith "wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
         or (NewProcessName endswith "bcdedit.exe"  and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no", "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
    | summarize ShadowTime = min(TimeGenerated), ShadowCmd = any(CommandLine) by Computer;
TakeOwn
| join kind=inner Icacls on Computer
| join kind=inner ShadowDelete on Computer
| extend DeltaMin = max_of(
        abs(datetime_diff('minute', TakeownTime, IcaclsTime)),
        abs(datetime_diff('minute', TakeownTime, ShadowTime)),
        abs(datetime_diff('minute', IcaclsTime,  ShadowTime)))
| where DeltaMin <= toint(WindowMin / 1m)
| project Computer, TakeownTime, IcaclsTime, ShadowTime, DeltaMin,
          TakeownCmd, IcaclsCmd, ShadowCmd
| order by TakeownTime desc
ucs.rationale: The takeown→icacls→vssadmin sequence is the documented impact-stage fingerprint for Evil Corp's ransomware family (WastedLocker, Hades, PhoenixCryptoLocker, Macaw, and the LockBit affiliate runs they used post-2022 to evade OFAC sanctions). Symantec's WastedLocker writeup, NCC Group's Hades report, and Microsoft's Manatee Tempest threat-intel post all call out this exact triad executed within minu
